header_text: Not a lot of likes: Thoughts

elements.text:
You decide to reply all to a department-wide email to share an idea. It's been a few hours and no one has responded to your suggestion yet. 

Here are some thoughts that might pop into mind:

text: My colleagues may not like my idea, and I can accept that.
My suggestion wasn't the best, but I don't have to be perfect.
People haven't checked their email yet.
I am proud of my idea.
